# Final Review Proposal

## Summary

No code-level findings in this revision. `git diff` shows only `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json` changed; requested implementation files (`src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`) were not modified in this patch, so there are no concrete issues to review in changed source. Ensure the lifecycle feature changes are actually present before this review round can validate correctness.

None.
